name: cloudflare-copilot-models
description: Automatically surfaces all Cloudflare Workers AI models in VS Code Copilot Chat

cloudflareCopilot.apiKey.markdownDescription: Your Cloudflare API Key. Consider using VS Code's secret storage for security.

cloudflareCopilot.gatewayId.description: Your Cloudflare AI Gateway ID (optional). When set, all model requests are routed through the gateway for analytics, caching, and rate limiting.

cloudflareCopilot.modelFilter.description: Filter which Cloudflare model types to surface in Copilot Chat.

cloudflareCopilot.completionModel.description: Optional model handle, name, or id to use for inline completions. When unset, the extension picks a Text Generation model using completion-focused heuristics.

cloudflareCopilot.completionSystemPrompt.default: You are a precise code completion engine. Return only the completion with no markdown or explanation.
cloudflareCopilot.completionSystemPrompt.description: Optional system prompt override used for inline completion requests.

cloudflareCopilot.completionExcludedLang.description: Language IDs that should not receive inline completions.

cloudflareCopilot.capabilityOverrides.description: Map model handles to specific capabilities to override automatic capability detection. Keys should be model handles, values are objects like { "toolCalling": true }.
